title: Upward Planar Straight-Line Embedding Witness Dataset Schema
description: Schema and field explanation for the full witness dataset generated over representative point sets of small order types.

scope.embedding_type: Planar straight-line embeddings on fixed point sets
scope.upwardness_model: Upwardness is considered up to rotation of the coordinate system.
scope.point_set_source: Representative point sets from Oswin Aichholzer's small order-type database.

dataset_file.description: Each nX_witness.json file contains the full witness dataset for one value of n.

n.description: Number of points in each representative point set.

bits.description: Bit width of the source order-type file.

dataset_type.description: Short label describing the generated witness dataset.

orientation_model.description: Description of the required orientation patterns.

total_required_orientations.description: Number of required direction patterns, equal to 2^(n-1) for path mode.

total_found_orientations.description: Number of required direction patterns for which a witness was found.

complete.description: True when all required orientation patterns have witnesses.

required_orientations.description: All required direction strings for this value of n.

missing_orientations.description: Required direction strings without a witness, empty when complete is true.

search_statistics.description: Counts describing how many sets and path orders were checked.

witness_record.description: A record for one upward planar straight-line embedding witness.

orientation_id.description: Identifier of the required orientation pattern.

dirs.description: Direction string for the path edges. The string length is n - 1 for ordinary paths.

symbols.+: The i-th edge is directed from order[i] to order[i+1].
symbols.-: The i-th edge is directed from order[i+1] to order[i].

set_id.description: Index of the representative point set within the source order-type data.

points.description: List of point coordinates. The index of a point is its position in this list.

order_id.description: Identifier of the path order checked during generation.

order.description: Point indices along the witness path.

undirected_edges.description: Undirected path edges as point-index pairs.

directed_edges.description: Directed witness edges as [tail, head] pairs.

up_direction_angle.description: A witness upward direction in the original coordinate system.

rotation_angle.description: A witness rotation angle. Rotating the drawing by this angle displays the witness as upward.

orientation_id_within_plane_path.description: Identifier of the same orientation within the discovered plane path.

interpretation_notes.fixed_coordinates: The stored coordinates are the original representative point-set coordinates.
interpretation_notes.rotated_witness_view: Use rotation_angle to display the selected witness as an upward drawing.
interpretation_notes.direction_string: For an order of length n, dirs has length n - 1 in path mode.
